title: plantago major subsp. intermedia
intro: Plantago major subsp. intermedia, also known as the large plantain or buckthorn plantain, is a subspecies of the common plantain (Plantago major) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Plantago major subsp. intermedia include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
